profile.name: Amjad Hassoun
profile.eyebrow: AI Engineer / Systems Administrator / Product Builder
profile.summary: I build practical AI-enabled products, dependable school systems, and polished web experiences that make complex technology easier to use in the real world.
profile.photoAlt: Amjad Hassoun presenting in front of a projected slide.

items.label: Developer Tools
items.text: Git, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Firebase, Canvas LMS API, XCode

items.label: Soft Skills
items.text: Bilingual (English/French), Technical Presentations, Agile Methodology, Client Relations

roles.title: Ingénieur en IA et Administrateur Système
bullets: Superviser les systèmes cloud, renforcer la sécurité et soutenir l'intégration de Gemini (Google AI).
Concevoir et déployer des applications web pour l'administration scolaire et les inscriptions.
Maintenir l'Active Directory de TFS et Google Workspace pour l'ensemble de l'organisation.

roles.title: Spécialiste S.T.E.A.M.
bullets: Présenter la technologie de l'IA aux élèves et encourager l'évaluation critique de son éthique.
Créer des démonstrations d'IA en exploitant des modèles de pointe (LLMs, Generative AI).
Collaborer avec la Tech Society pour intégrer l'IA générative dans les initiatives élèves.

items.title: Spurry Inc
items.subtitle: iOS App Developer
bullets: Co-developed the askCody chatbot and an adaptive AI-driven flashcard system for personalized learning.
Developed an offline Python interpreter on iOS to streamline coding processes and enhance privacy.
Collaborated on education-focused mobile apps, improving programming learning experiences.

links.label: Python Academy on the App Store

items.title: Outlier
items.subtitle: Data Scientist / AI Training
bullets: Analyzed AI model responses for the reinforcement learning (RLHF) team to improve response quality.
Evaluated correctness, logic, and safety performance across different Large Language Models (LLMs).
Synthesized complex data into actionable insights to refine model training algorithms.

items.title: Q-Tools Chrome Extension
items.subtitle: JavaScript / Canvas API / AI Integration
bullets: Developed a Chrome Extension to expand and customize the interface of the Canvas LMS.
Integrated AI capabilities enabling users to chat with modules, add notes, and query content directly.
Scalable solution currently used to assist students in interfacing with external content.

items.title: University of Toronto
items.subtitle: Honours Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

items.title: Scotiabank Hackathon S:HA<KS 2021
items.subtitle: First Place Winner
bullets: Won 1st place by creating an accessible fintech solution for Scotiabank's digital offerings.

notes: Presented Q-Tools at AI Tinkerers Toronto - Inaugural Meetup (April 2024)
Attended First Toronto LangChain Meetup sponsored by Cohere AI (July 2023)
